name: Polar Signals
description: Commercial continuous profiling platform built on Parca, offering always-on production profiling via eBPF.

seo.title: Polar Signals — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: Polar Signals: Commercial continuous profiling platform built on Parca, offering always-on production profiling via eBPF.

when_to_use: Always-on eBPF production profiling with zero overhead
Continuous CPU and memory profiling for Go services
Flame graph diffs between releases for regression detection

pros: Built on open Parca, avoiding pure lock-in
Finds CPU and memory wins hard to catch otherwise
Low overhead on modern Linux kernels
cons: Requires recent kernels and eBPF support
Profiling literacy needed to get value
Narrow product scope, not a full APM
review.verdict: Excellent for performance-obsessed backend teams; adopt it as a complement to APM, not a replacement.
review.best_for: Engineering teams optimizing Linux services at real scale
review.not_for: Teams without eBPF-capable infra or profiling know-how
